description.title: Cut to the chase
description.content: Remove filler words, digressions, blather — all the obvious cuts

description.title: Sound smarter
description.content: Remove uhms, uhs, repeated words, and other verbal clutter

description.title: Get to the good stuff
description.content: Cut all but your best takes

description.title: Do away with awkward silences
description.content: Shrink or cut silences & lapses in conversation

description.title: Design your video
description.content: Let AI add scenes, layouts, and some B-roll for an eye-catching look

description.title: No teleprompter, no problem
description.content: Shift your on-screen eyes to the camera, even if your on-face eyes were looking elsewhere

description.title: Look who's talking
description.content: Keep the active speaker smack-dab in the center

description.title: No green screen, no problem
description.content: Remove your background so you can replace it with something more professional/less awful

description.title: Who's speaking and who isn't
description.content: Automatically pick layouts & cameras to show active conversations

description.title: Type words, create media
description.content: Describe any image or video you can imagine; AI Tools will create it for you

description.title: All eyes on you
description.content: Blur your background so nobody gets distracted by whatever that is behind you

description.title: Viral bait, while you wait
description.content: AI Tools picks your most viral-worthy moments & creates clips that pop

description.title: Supercut, super-fast
description.content: Create a new composition with all your best moments

description.title: Did I say something interesting?
description.content: Let AI Tools find the most compelling parts for you

description.title: Go global
description.content: Translate your transcript, captions and audio to other languages

description.title: What's in a name? A lot.
description.content: Get title suggestions that capture what's most compelling about what you created

description.title: Break it down
description.content: Get an accurate, concise synopsis of your content
